name: superlazy-cc
description: Gated, reviewed feature-build pipeline: brainstorming -> spec-critic -> writing-plans -> plan-critic -> execution -> code-critic, with a PreToolUse seam gate. Critics run on OpenAI Codex (codex exec, read-only) instead of Claude subagents. Drives the superpowers-extended-cc skills (must be installed/enabled). Also ships superlazy-review: a two-model (Claude + Codex) adversarial code-review skill.
